message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This is a disclaimer and branding page from a McQuay Air Conditioning manual. It contains the company logo, three disclaimer statements in Chinese regarding product variations and documentation accuracy, a document code, and a watermark from a third-party website.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "McQuay Air Conditioning logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Disclaimer statements (Chinese)"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Document code CH1206-3000-F"},
    {"type": "watermark", "label": "制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["brand_identification", "document_provenance", "disclaimer_information"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "McQuay®\nAir Conditioning\n★ 印刷资料内的产品可能与实物有差别，购买时请参考实机。\n★ 所有资料经过仔细审核，如有任何印刷错漏，麦克维尔公司不承担因此产生的后果。\n★ 机型、参数、性能会因产品的改良有所改变，恕不另行通知。具体参数请以产品铭牌为准。\nCH1206-3000-F\n制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page contains no technical diagrams, schematics, or specific equipment data. The watermark indicates the source of this specific document scan, not necessarily the original publisher.",
  "confidence": 1.0
}

parsed.summary: This is a disclaimer and branding page from a McQuay Air Conditioning manual. It contains the company logo, three disclaimer statements in Chinese regarding product variations and documentation accuracy, a document code, and a watermark from a third-party website.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
McQuay®
Air Conditioning
★ 印刷资料内的产品可能与实物有差别，购买时请参考实机。
★ 所有资料经过仔细审核，如有任何印刷错漏，麦克维尔公司不承担因此产生的后果。
★ 机型、参数、性能会因产品的改良有所改变，恕不另行通知。具体参数请以产品铭牌为准。
CH1206-3000-F
制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page contains no technical diagrams, schematics, or specific equipment data. The watermark indicates the source of this specific document scan, not necessarily the original publisher.
